perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a blue wrap-style top and black skirt, stands in front of a Costco entrance. She gestures with her hands as she speaks to the camera. (2) The camera pans to a sign on the wall detailing the opening hours for Black Friday 2025 (Nov 24 - Nov 30). (3) The shot changes to the woman inside the warehouse-style store, now joined by another young woman wearing a white knit hat and a white sweater. They stand side-by-side, gesturing enthusiastically. (4) A close-up shot shows a price tag for 'Glico Bisco Biscuits' with a Black Friday discount, reducing the price from $399 to $299. (5) The two women appear together again, pointing at the camera and waving, encouraging the audience to follow for more updates.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, fast-paced background music begins. A clear female voice starts speaking in Mandarin with an enthusiastic and informative tone. (2) The vocal continues explaining the new store hours while ambient sounds of a crowded store environment are faintly heard in the background. (3) A second female voice joins in occasionally, adding emphasis and excitement to the conversation. (4) The music remains consistent in volume and tempo, maintaining a lively atmosphere. (5) The voices finish with a call to action as the music fades out.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '好事多黑五攻略 營業時間改8點' (Costco Black Friday Strategy: Opening hours changed to 8 AM). (2) Functional Text: 'ENTRANCE COSTCO WHOLESALE' on the store facade. (3) Functional Text: '2025 11.24 - 11.30 8:00 - 21:30' on a posters detailing store hours. (4) Decorative Text: 'BLACK FRIDAY' and '$299' on a large yellow price tag. (5) Functional Text: Subtitles in Traditional Chinese reflecting the spoken dialogue throughout the video.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Information Display (Opening Hours) -> Secondary Character Intro -> Specific Product Highlight -> Call to Action/Outro

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female characters in focus; approximately 10 shoppers and staff visible in the background entrance and store aisles.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman has long dark hair, wearing a blue long-sleeved top with white puff sleeves, a black pleated skirt, and a silver crossbody bag. The second woman wears a white beanie, a white sweater, and ripped blue jeans.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video transitions from the entrance of a Costco Wholesale warehouse (with red and blue signage) to the interior aisles filled with pallets, merchandise, and shoppers.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright artificial warehouse lighting and natural daylight at the entrance.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a shopping guide and promotional vlog to inform Taiwanese consumers about Costco's 2025 Black Friday sale details, specifically the change in opening hours and highlighting significant discounts on popular snacks to drive foot traffic and social media engagement.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creators are specifically highlighting store hours and price discounts for a particular retailer and brand.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy duo presentation with stylized Traditional Chinese captions.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video targets value-conscious shoppers in Taiwan using a friendly, peer-to-peer recommendation style.
